values: Enable debug mode
Warning: Will break balance!
If enabled, engendered mobs will be balanced based on the lore of Engender (Umbrella_Ghast's Balance)
If disabled, engender mobs will be balanced for a fair experience (Mrbt0907's Balance)
Warning: Will change the game dramatically!
If enabled, the Engender Mod will become much harder to complete, and the mobs will be extremely difficult to combat
Settings that deal with general Engender functionality
Settings that deal with Engender Mobs
If enabled, engendered mob death messages will display in chat.
If enabled, boss themes and general music from Engender can play ingame
If enabled, minibosses can play music themes
If enabled, killing an Ender Dragon will always spawn a Dragon Egg.
If enabled, Mana Orbs can spawn.
If "Enable Mana Orbs" is enabled, This will determine how far Mana Orbs can be from a player to spawn on mob deaths.
If enabled, some mobs will be converted into wild engendered mobs.
If enabled, engendered mobs can grief the world
If enabled, engendered mobs will have engender regeneration along side natural regeneration
If enabled, most ally engendered mobs must eat to survive.
If disabled, all ally mobs can eat to regain health
If enabled, all engendered mobs can turn into heros
If enabled, converts most mobs into mob girls.
If enabled, players can breed with mob girls.
